description: Analyst-first cohort and config view across sources, providers, and outcome patterns.

panels.title: Net PnL

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(realized_pnl_usd), 0) AS value FROM v_source_outcome_daily WHERE session_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom() AND session_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo() AND COALESCE(source::text, '') ~* '^(${source:regex})$' AND COALESCE(config_version::text, '') ~* '^(${configVersion:regex})$'

panels.description: Net realized PnL across the current source and config slice.

panels.title: Acceptance Rate

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE((SUM(candidates_accepted)::numeric / NULLIF(SUM(candidates_discovered), 0)) * 100, 0) AS value FROM v_source_outcome_daily WHERE session_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom() AND session_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo() AND COALESCE(source::text, '') ~* '^(${source:regex})$' AND COALESCE(config_version::text, '') ~* '^(${configVersion:regex})$'

panels.description: Weighted acceptance rate for the current analytic slice.

panels.title: Provider Units / Accepted

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(provider_units)::numeric / NULLIF(SUM(candidates_accepted), 0), 0) AS value FROM v_kpi_by_config_window WHERE COALESCE(config_version::text, '') ~* '^(${configVersion:regex})$'

panels.description: Provider cost per accepted candidate across selected config windows.

panels.title: Worst Reject Share

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(100 - acceptance_rate_pct), 0) AS value FROM v_source_outcome_daily WHERE session_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom() AND session_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo() AND COALESCE(source::text, '') ~* '^(${source:regex})$' AND COALESCE(config_version::text, '') ~* '^(${configVersion:regex})$'

panels.description: Highest observed reject share in the selected source cohort.

panels.title: Source PnL Trend

targets.rawSql: SELECT session_date::timestamp AS "time", source AS metric, realized_pnl_usd AS value FROM v_source_outcome_daily WHERE session_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom() AND session_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo() AND COALESCE(source::text, '') ~* '^(${source:regex})$' AND COALESCE(config_version::text, '') ~* '^(${configVersion:regex})$' ORDER BY 1, 2

panels.description: Daily PnL trend for source-level comparison.

panels.title: Reject Share Trend

targets.rawSql: SELECT session_date::timestamp AS "time", source AS metric, (100 - acceptance_rate_pct) AS value FROM v_source_outcome_daily WHERE session_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom() AND session_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo() AND COALESCE(source::text, '') ~* '^(${source:regex})$' AND COALESCE(config_version::text, '') ~* '^(${configVersion:regex})$' ORDER BY 1, 2

panels.description: Reject-share trend by source for quality drift review.

panels.title: Candidate Cohort Matrix

targets.rawSql: SELECT session_date, source, daypart, security_risk, liquidity_band, volume_band, candidate_count, accepted_count, bought_count, win_count, loss_count, realized_pnl_usd FROM v_candidate_cohort_daily WHERE session_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom() AND session_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo() AND COALESCE(source::text, '') ~* '^(${source:regex})$' AND COALESCE(daypart::text, '') ~* '^(${daypart:regex})$' AND COALESCE(security_risk::text, '') ~* '^(${securityRisk:regex})$' AND COALESCE(config_version::text, '') ~* '^(${configVersion:regex})$' ORDER BY session_date DESC, realized_pnl_usd DESC LIMIT 60

panels.description: Candidate cohorts for source, daypart, and risk-shape comparison.

panels.title: Position Cohort Matrix

targets.rawSql: SELECT session_date, source, daypart, exit_profile, security_risk, outcome, position_count, avg_return_pct, avg_hold_minutes, win_rate * 100 AS win_rate_pct, realized_pnl_usd FROM v_position_cohort_daily WHERE session_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom() AND session_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo() AND COALESCE(source::text, '') ~* '^(${source:regex})$' AND COALESCE(daypart::text, '') ~* '^(${daypart:regex})$' AND COALESCE(exit_profile::text, '') ~* '^(${exitProfile:regex})$' AND COALESCE(security_risk::text, '') ~* '^(${securityRisk:regex})$' AND COALESCE(config_version::text, '') ~* '^(${configVersion:regex})$' ORDER BY session_date DESC, realized_pnl_usd DESC LIMIT 60

panels.description: Position cohorts for outcome, return, and hold-time comparisons.

panels.title: Provider Pressure by Endpoint

targets.rawSql: SELECT bucket_at, provider, endpoint, total_calls, total_units, avg_latency_ms, error_count FROM v_api_endpoint_hourly WHERE bucket_at >= $__timeFrom() AND bucket_at <= $__timeTo() AND COALESCE(provider::text, '') ~* '^(${provider:regex})$' AND COALESCE(endpoint::text, '') ~* '^(${endpoint:regex})$' ORDER BY bucket_at DESC, total_units DESC LIMIT 80

panels.description: Endpoint-level provider load for cohort-level RCA.

list.definition: SELECT id::text AS __value, COALESCE(name, id)::text AS __text FROM "StrategyPack" WHERE status <> 'RETIRED' ORDER BY 2
list.label: Pack
list.name: pack
list.query: SELECT id::text AS __value, COALESCE(name, id)::text AS __text FROM "StrategyPack" WHERE status <> 'RETIRED' ORDER BY 2

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT config_version::text AS __text, config_version::text AS __value FROM "ConfigSnapshot" ORDER BY config_version::int DESC
list.label: Config Version
list.name: configVer
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT config_version::text AS __text, config_version::text AS __value FROM "ConfigSnapshot" ORDER BY config_version::int DESC

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT source AS __text, source AS __value FROM v_source_outcome_daily ORDER BY 1
list.label: Source
list.name: source
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT source AS __text, source AS __value FROM v_source_outcome_daily ORDER BY 1

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT provider AS __text, provider AS __value FROM v_api_provider_daily ORDER BY 1
list.label: Provider
list.name: provider
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT provider AS __text, provider AS __value FROM v_api_provider_daily ORDER BY 1

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT endpoint AS __text, endpoint AS __value FROM v_api_endpoint_efficiency WHERE COALESCE(provider::text, '') ~* '^(${provider:regex})$' ORDER BY 1
list.label: Endpoint
list.name: endpoint
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT endpoint AS __text, endpoint AS __value FROM v_api_endpoint_efficiency WHERE COALESCE(provider::text, '') ~* '^(${provider:regex})$' ORDER BY 1

list.definition: SELECT config_version::text AS __text, config_version AS __value FROM v_config_change_log ORDER BY config_version DESC
list.label: Config Version
list.name: configVersion
list.query: SELECT config_version::text AS __text, config_version AS __value FROM v_config_change_log ORDER BY config_version DESC

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT daypart AS __text, daypart AS __value FROM v_candidate_cohort_daily ORDER BY 1
list.label: Daypart
list.name: daypart
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT daypart AS __text, daypart AS __value FROM v_candidate_cohort_daily ORDER BY 1

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT exit_profile AS __text, exit_profile AS __value FROM v_position_cohort_daily ORDER BY 1
list.label: Exit Profile
list.name: exitProfile
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT exit_profile AS __text, exit_profile AS __value FROM v_position_cohort_daily ORDER BY 1

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT security_risk AS __text, security_risk AS __value FROM v_candidate_cohort_daily ORDER BY 1
list.label: Security Risk
list.name: securityRisk
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT security_risk AS __text, security_risk AS __value FROM v_candidate_cohort_daily ORDER BY 1

title: Analyst Insights Overview
